subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letter was received and, praise be to God, its contents were soul-refreshing and bore testimony to nineteen years of service [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید الحمد لله مضامین دلنشین بود و دلیل بر خدماتی که نوزده سال
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
